languages.text: "Да будет так. Пойдемте, Вольный Торговец. Нам больше нечего искать в царстве мертвых. Нас ждут деяния живых".
"As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."
languages.original_text: "Да будет так. Пойдемте, Вольный Торговец. Нам больше нечего искать в царстве мертвых. Нас ждут деяния живых".

traits.locale_text: "As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."
"As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."
"As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."

languages.text: «Como quiera. Vámonos pues, Comerciante Independiente. Nada más queda por buscar en el reino de los muertos. Los asuntos de los vivos nos aguardan».
languages.original_text: "As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."

traits.locale_text: «Como quiera. Vámonos pues, Comerciante Independiente. Nada más queda por buscar en el reino de los muertos. Los asuntos de los vivos nos aguardan».

languages.text: “如您所愿。我们走吧，行商浪人。死者之境已无可寻之物，生者之业待你我践行。”
languages.original_text: "As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."

traits.locale_text: “如您所愿。我们走吧，行商浪人。死者之境已无可寻之物，生者之业待你我践行。”

languages.text: « Comme il vous plaira. Sur ce, il est temps de partir, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Nous n'avons plus rien à chercher dans le monde des morts. Retournons auprès des vivants. »
languages.original_text: "As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."

traits.locale_text: « Comme il vous plaira. Sur ce, il est temps de partir, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Nous n'avons plus rien à chercher dans le monde des morts. Retournons auprès des vivants. »

languages.text: "Nasıl isterseniz. Gidelim Hür Tacir. Ölüler diyarında başka işimiz kalmadı. Yaşayanlar olarak eylemlerde bulunmaya dönelim."
languages.original_text: "As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl isterseniz. Gidelim Hür Tacir. Ölüler diyarında başka işimiz kalmadı. Yaşayanlar olarak eylemlerde bulunmaya dönelim."

languages.text: "Wie Ihr wünscht. Lasst uns gehen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Unsere Suche im Reich der Toten ist beendet. Nun warten die Taten der Lebenden auf uns."
languages.original_text: "As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."

traits.locale_text: "Wie Ihr wünscht. Lasst uns gehen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Unsere Suche im Reich der Toten ist beendet. Nun warten die Taten der Lebenden auf uns."

languages.text: 「お望みのままに。さあ、参りましょう、ローグトレーダー。死者の領域に、もはや求めるものはありません。生者の務めが、我々を待っています」
languages.original_text: "As you will. Let us be off, Rogue Trader. We have nothing more to seek in the realm of the dead. The deeds of the living await us."

traits.locale_text: 「お望みのままに。さあ、参りましょう、ローグトレーダー。死者の領域に、もはや求めるものはありません。生者の務めが、我々を待っています」
